title: MineConfigured
description: Configure Minecraft to how you want to play
body:
![Tiltle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/664ea8daec6f6e71065a3afc31af0ce2211906d5.png)MineConfigured adds many new gamerules/configurations to change minecraft to better fit your play style. 

- set and change the mob cap for all creatures (uncapped so be aware of performance issues)
- change the growth height for cactus, sugarcane and bamboo
- customize chickens egg mechanics  
- change animal breeding speed and amount of babies created when bred 



Versions supported for 1.0 (1.18.2, 1.19.4)
